Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Maven build base image to use Eclipse Temurin 21 to compile the application with Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code likely uses Java 21 features or APIs that are not available in Java 17, causing compilation failures if built with an older JDK.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the runtime base image to use Distroless Java 21 to ensure the application runs on the correct JDK version.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Running a Java 21 compiled application on a Java 17 runtime image will result in a runtime error (e.g., 'Unsupported class file major version') because the runtime does not support the bytecode version.
